title: Sanctuary Aeronautics
description: A modpack based around Create: Aeronautics.
body:
This is a modpack based around Create: Aeronautics, designed for the use on the Survival Multiplayer Server of the same name. Sanctuary Aeronautics is built with creativity and exploration in mind. You can expect custom sky island world generation thanks to Klinbee's Skylands over the Sea, and improvements to vanilla structure generation thanks to YUNG's API. Expect to need to build helicopters, planes, hot air balloons, or even... Warships? The sky islands call for methods of travel, so what are you waiting for? Create some! Features:
  • Simple Voice Chat built in!

  • A whole slew of Create additions, including Aeronautics

  • Lootr installed for multiplayer fairness - no more rushing to get the loot first!

![A screenshot of some floating islands, half concealed in the clouds.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6f3268ab1ee5c7f45afbb918cdbc4b62aa9871b_0.webp)
